review_title: Amazing Software for Online Quizes

review_title: The customer service is truly excellent!

cons: Nothing for now. The value for money is fair. I chose to create just one quiz for the moment. and I know that if I have any questions, the support team is there to help

review_title: If you are not using this Quiz for your Shop, you are missing out!
description: My overall experience was that this company really wants to be able to bring solutions to customers, exceed their expectations and they do not use NO for an answer. They will figure out a way, if possible, and if not, they will give you and show you options.
author: Lillian L.
pros: I loved how easy it was to customize, the interface was user friendly and most importantly, the customer service was excellent! I have not had this type of customer service in any online platform!
cons: I don't have any yet because everything has been so far excellent!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I just finished spending 3 days searching for a suitable product recommendation quiz
description: I chose Quizell I spent 3 days searching for something that will work. I tried them all. Quizell is the best by far. Easy to use, intuitive, easy logic jumping, customizable, link redirects at the results page, has a customizable no results page, no extra features I'll never use, excellent customer service (this is saturday afternoon and I just got off a chat with Omri), and inexpensive when compared to the dozen competitors I signed up for and tested before I came back to Quizell (I tried them first and ended up coming back). And best of all, you can actually embed it and test it before paying for it (I could have used it for free, but it's such a breath of fresh air compared to the rest that I felt guilty using it for free. No other quiz maker lets you do this (it's the reason it took me 3 days - I would build a custom quiz - including logic - based on the promise of free only to get told when I was done, I had to pay to publish. That was immensely frustrating). Plus, I wanted to remove the logo and customize products on the results page.
author: Steve R.
pros: 1. Inexpensive compared to competitors2. Intuitive3. Nothing extra I'll never use4. Customer support
cons: I don't have any cons. It looks and performs perfectly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best engagements app in the market!
author: Alpesh P.
pros: Quizell redefines engagement with its intuitive quiz and form builder, offering personalized experiences that drive conversions and deepen insights. A game-changer for any digital strategy!
cons: Not Found any cons. I would recommend this app!
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Simple and Creative
description: I truly enjoyed collaborating with Quizell! Straightforward, simple and unique.
author: Julie K.
pros: I enjoy Quizell as it doesn’t make quiz creation complicated, it isn’t extremely expensive, easy to use on your site, and the questions that are suggested can truly help you find or figure out what’s best for you.
cons: You have to remove the branding on your quiz. It can look a little tacky if you don’t.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Beauty quiz
description: My overall experience was great I had a lot of details that needed to be implemented within my quiz and the customer service is really great Omri is the best really took his time to customize it according to all of your needs which is important for any business that this quiz is going to be applied to and most importantly delivers what it needed for your business and as well as your customer experience using it
author: Titi L.
pros: I love how easy and quick it is to use it’s not complicated very user-friendly especially for my business is important that it doesn’t take too long
cons: The only kind that I would have is more customization features be added but it’s pretty simple and straightforward that’s the only con there is super simple to use And navigate which I truly appreciate as a user and someone who depends on the quiz for my business it’s amazing!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
